Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2142 0 0}Kinda worried about what could happen in there, but Koromaru and I will go check things out![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 52 -1 0 0}Leave finding supplies to us! You just concentrate on exploring, Ai-chan.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_077_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 52 -1 0 0}Guess that solves the starve-to-death problem we had, though![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 52 -1 0 0}Koromaru and I are finally back to exploring with you guys![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2117 0 0}Who woulda thought we'd be back at it again with this endless exploration? I'll just do what I do best![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 52 -1 0 0}No slacking off for me. Don't want to cause trouble for our leader Ai-chan![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_017_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 52 -1 0 0}Has Yuka-tan been kinda... gloomy lately? Or is it just me?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_019_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 3 52 -1 0 0}But what can we do? I guess we should keep an eye on her...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 6 52 -1 0 0}It's so hard to understand what a girl's thinking, especially Yuka-tan.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_020_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 4 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2099 0 0}Oh. Uh, really? Was my read on her that bad...?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 52 -1 0 0}I mean, she looks all normal and stuff, but I can't shake the feeling there's something a little off...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_045_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2074 0 0}Back then, when I stood here, I used to question whether or not I actually wanted to go exploring.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 6 52 -1 0 0}Exploring for days in a row is no joke. If you asked me back then, I'd scream and run away.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 4 52 -1 0 0}Wait... If the same day is repeating, does this even count as going multiple days in a row?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_021_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2061 0 0}So... that was Sanada-san before high school, and I'm a year younger than him... Wait, he was a third-year in middle school then!?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 4 52 -1 0 0}It had been barely half a year since I transferred! And he was fightin' Shadows already?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 4 52 -1 0 0}Damn, that's badass. Don't you think, Koromaru? The will to fight was coursing through his veins back then, too![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2088 0 0}In any case, we, the Daring Duo, are ready to join the exploration whenever you need us![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_022_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2092 0 0}My dad's gotten better since then, but he's still... Well, he ain't exactly the most upstanding citizen.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 52 -1 0 0}Aaagh, that's enough of that! And don't feel like you have to make me feel better or anything.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 11 52 -1 0 0}Besides, I think what's going on right now is way more important! So to get us out of this...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2119 0 0}Your best option is to bring me, the Great Junpei Iori! I'll get us out of this![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_023_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2061 0 0}So, with those freaky doors that show the past, we've seen Amada, Sanada-san, me and Koromaru, and Kirijo-senpai.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 52 -1 0 0}And if we're the reason this thing exists, then I wonder if there's a door for each of us. That means there's, uh, how many left...?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 52 -1 0 0}No use thinking about it now. Let's just get in there and open those doors.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_029_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 3 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2093 0 0}I don't think Metis has some evil plan or anything. But she can be a little difficult to talk to at times...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 3 52 -1 0 0}No offense to you, Ai-chan, but what's up with an anti-Shadow weapon that gets all cranky like that?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_030_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 6 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2084 0 0}I dunno if I can explain this well, but I don't think anybody's right here.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 52 -1 0 0}I mean, even you don't know what to do here. Right, Aigis?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 3 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2056 0 0}That also doesn't sit well with me. That's why... I can't take your side.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 6 52 -1 0 0}She said to think about how we feel... So I'm going to do just that.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_031_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2097 0 0}Now that I've had time to calm down and think... I've realized that li'l sis is just as cute as you, Ai-chan![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 11 52 -1 0 0}Never really noticed it before. Man, I must have been out of it.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 52 -1 0 0}That butterfly thing on her face is actually... kinda mysterious and irresistible, y'know?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_032_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 3 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2116 0 0}Really glad things didn't end with li'l sis in tears.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 3 52 -1 0 0}I know it's a bit late coming from me now, but if you died there, Aigis...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 6 52 -1 0 0}Or even worse, if I was the one to take the key from you...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 8 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2031 0 0}That would have been the worst friggin' thing to live with! Let's never do something like that again![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_049_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2013 0 0}Oh, Ai-chan. You free at all? Wanna do something fun?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 52 -1 0 0}Check out this {f 4 4 0 37 1 16776}! Let's see if we can learn a thing or two from what we found in the Abyss of Time![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_050_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Should I spend time with Junpei-san?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_055_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2029 0 0}Alright then. Well, if you have some time, feel free to drop by.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_060_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2002 0 0}Oh, Ai-chan. You free at all? Wanna do something fun?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 52 -1 0 0}I'm actually not so sure I can do this on my own... You think you could help me out?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_061_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 52 -1 0 0}We found this {f 4 4 0 37 1 16777} in the Abyss of Time, right? So I wanted to try cooking.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 11 52 -1 0 0}Never cooked in my life, but I think it'll be fine! Let's head to the kitchen pronto![n]{f 1 1}
